heading: Prerequisites
body:
- The [Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current) installed and running v1.14.3 or
  later.

- [MongoDB Command Line Database Tools](https://fastdl.mongodb.org/tools/db/mongodb-database-tools-macos-arm64-100.10.0.zip)
  and [Docker](https://www.docker.com/) installed.

- An interactive Python notebook that you can run locally.
  You can run interactive Python notebooks in [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/datascience/jupyter-notebooks).
  Ensure that your environment runs Python v3.10 or later.
